lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Ah, another fan! Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Who are you?

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: You don't know me? I am Bosun Zarah!

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: I won twelfth place in the Etceteria Boatswain Championships!

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: I mopped the deck on the fastest ship to complete the Kourend Circuit!

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: I was one of only three survivors on the first ship to almost damage the Sharhai!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, at some point I hope to be hiring a crew of my own. When that happens, you seem like you have all the... qualifications... needed to join.

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Great! Don't take too long though, as I'm sure plenty of others will be wanting to try and recruit me first!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Given your... skills... would you like to join my crew?

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Ha! You can't command the legendary Bosun Zarah!

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Anything for another shot at the Sharhai!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, good luck with it all.

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Ah, one of my fans is back! Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, who are you again?

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Bosun Zarah of course! Boatswain Championships... Kourend Circuit... The list is endless!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, yes, of course...

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Captain!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. How are you enjoying being part of the crew?

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: I suppose the real question is how are you enjoying having me as part of your crew?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's fine I suppose, thanks for asking.

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: You are welcome, Captain!

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Sometimes I even impress myself.

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: Let me know when we reach the Sharhai.

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: You don't want me doing anything so I don't show up the rest of the crew, right?

lines.speaker: Bosun Zarah
lines.text: I was born for this.
